# Graph Report - LUMIERA  (2026-07-19)

## Corpus Check
- 15151 files · ~21,030,416 words
- Verdict: corpus is large enough that graph structure adds value.

## Summary
- 102172 nodes · 191820 edges · 7820 communities (6331 shown, 1489 thin omitted)
- Extraction: 98% EXTRACTED · 2% INFERRED · 0% AMBIGUOUS · INFERRED: 3452 edges (avg confidence: 0.7)
- Token cost: 0 input · 0 output

## Graph Freshness
- Built from commit: `c482e4b5`
- Run `git rev-parse HEAD` and compare to check if the graph is stale.
- Run `graphify update .` after code changes (no API cost).

## God Nodes (most connected - your core abstractions)
1. `loadFonts()` - 3701 edges
2. `getAvailableFonts()` - 1830 edges
3. `OBJECT` - 868 edges
4. `>=1.0` - 477 edges
5. `date` - 436 edges
6. `DomEditSelection` - 188 edges
7. `TimelineElement` - 169 edges
8. `item` - 136 edges
9. `registerWorkflowRoutes()` - 135 edges
10. `t()` - 135 edges

## Surprising Connections (you probably didn't know these)
- `allocFreePort()` --indirect_call--> `reject()`  [INFERRED]
  youtube-video-suite/vendor/hyperframes/packages/cli/src/server/portUtils.test.ts → dashboard-qanat/backend/scriptQuality/automaticRepair.js
- `startConfigProbeServer()` --indirect_call--> `reject()`  [INFERRED]
  youtube-video-suite/vendor/hyperframes/packages/cli/src/server/portUtils.test.ts → dashboard-qanat/backend/scriptQuality/automaticRepair.js
- `getExistingProjectsMetadata()` --indirect_call--> `item`  [INFERRED]
  dashboard-qanat/backend/server.js → youtube-video-suite/vendor/remotion/packages/studio/src/components/SegmentedControl.tsx
- `createSpawnSpy()` --indirect_call--> `command()`  [INFERRED]
  youtube-video-suite/vendor/hyperframes/packages/engine/src/utils/ffprobe.test.ts → dashboard-qanat/backend/youtubeQualityGate.js
- `countingRunner()` --indirect_call--> `command()`  [INFERRED]
  youtube-video-suite/vendor/hyperframes/packages/studio-server/src/helpers/mediaCodecMap.test.ts → dashboard-qanat/backend/youtubeQualityGate.js

## Import Cycles
- 2-file cycle: `youtube-video-suite/vendor/remotion/packages/renderer/src/index.ts -> youtube-video-suite/vendor/remotion/packages/renderer/src/select-composition.ts -> youtube-video-suite/vendor/remotion/packages/renderer/src/index.ts`
- 3-file cycle: `youtube-video-suite/vendor/remotion/packages/studio/src/error-overlay/react-overlay/listen-to-runtime-errors.ts -> youtube-video-suite/vendor/remotion/packages/studio/src/error-overlay/remotion-overlay/Overlay.tsx -> youtube-video-suite/vendor/remotion/packages/studio/src/error-overlay/remotion-overlay/ErrorLoader.tsx -> youtube-video-suite/vendor/remotion/packages/studio/src/error-overlay/react-overlay/listen-to-runtime-errors.ts`
- 3-file cycle: `youtube-video-suite/vendor/remotion/packages/studio/src/components/Timeline/TimelinePrimitiveFieldValue.tsx -> youtube-video-suite/vendor/remotion/packages/studio/src/components/Timeline/TimelineTransformOriginField.tsx -> youtube-video-suite/vendor/remotion/packages/studio/src/components/Timeline/TimelineSchemaField.tsx -> youtube-video-suite/vendor/remotion/packages/studio/src/components/Timeline/TimelinePrimitiveFieldValue.tsx`

### Community 1503 - "The 18 rules"
Cohesion: 0.09
Nodes (22): 10. Animate transform only, never the letter itself, 11. Minimum 0.4s per word visible, 12. Stagger is the primary expressive axis, 13. Emphasis escalates _within_ a phrase, not _between_ phrases, 14. Break rhythm once per 30s, 15. Caption what adds, cut what restates, 16. Segment on breath, not on duration, 17. Safe zones per platform, always (+14 more)
